titleStmt.title: SII 38.62: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 62.

p.hi: King: ⎯⎯ Year Śaka 1434, Īśvara, Jyeshṭa ba. di. [30], solar eclipse: June 13, 1512 A.D.

summary.p: It records the gift of wet land called Nasalādēvi-cheruvu, under the irrigation of Dādulūru for maintaining a lamp tiruvalika and for providing other offerings to the god Pōtuḷarāju at the above village by a certain Koṇḍama-Nāyanigāru, son of mahānāyaṅkakachārya Chāki Chennama-Nāyaḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śatakavaruṣalu 1434 gu yīsvara saṁvatsa
ra jēṣṭa ba 30 lu sū¨ryyagrahaṇa puṇyakālamaṁdu
dādulūri pōtuḷrāju neyivedya nityanaṁda tiruvaḷe
keku śrīmanmahānāyaṁkācāyyacāke ce
nnamanāyani komāruḍu koṁḍamanāyani gāru ta
va taṁḍri ceṁnamanāyaniki puṇyaṁgānu pōtuḷrāju nayivedya
tiruvaḷēkeku prākudēvuniki cele maḍigāka yi grahaṇa pu
nyakālamaṁdu dādulūranu mudanakālva jāmāstaḷaṁ maḍi kālva
ku Ākutōṭastaḷaṁ . diguva kālvajaṁcimanistaḷaṁ 83 nāsaladēvi cerulu
kiṁdanu pēratiṁmmana voḍlalōna Āvusaḷtaṁ varimaḍi cēnu maḍi
madaya cenistaḷaṁ nāyani ce cenistaḷaṁ
Akṣarala padumaḍiraḍumaḷa cēnu
cāki koṁḍamanāyaḍu travi cēnu Ācadrā¨rka
stāyigānu pōtuḷrājuku nayivēdya tiru
vaḷiku dādulūri padumaḍiraḍu maḷa ce
nu sū¨ryyagrahaṇa punyakālamaṁddu dedulūrini dāra
vōsi svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ pa
radattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu yi dha¨rmma
naku yavvaru tappinānu sunakamāṁsaṁ tinna
Digital edition of SII 38.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
